title: What does "Include updates section in form" do
excerpt:
Newer Monday user here,  I am having trouble understanding what  the “Include updates section in form” actually does. I have turned it on and off and do not see a difference. What is a use case for this setting? 
The for…

posts.author: michaelPHG (michaelp@paramounthomegroup.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Newer Monday user here, I am having trouble understanding what the “Include updates section in form” actually does. I have turned it on and off and do not see a difference. What is a use case for this setting?

The form I am using is for a ticketing system for our team without Monday accounts

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: If you have it on, when they type information there it goes ‘into’ the item in the updates section.
